items.title: Coors Light launches a massive Tallerboy canister

items.title: Watch: Thousands fill Barcelona streets for Pope Leo visit
items.dek: Pope Leo XIV visited Barcelona's iconic Sagrada Família basilica as part of his week-long visit to Spain.
items.body: Pope Leo XIV visited Barcelona's iconic Sagrada Família basilica as part of his week-long visit to Spain.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: French singer Patrick Bruel faces rape charges
items.dek: Bruel has been placed under judicial investigation, which means an examining magistrate will look more deeply into the case.
items.body: Bruel has been placed under judicial investigation, which means an examining magistrate will look more deeply into the case.
items.author: IriLine Desk
